texto: To The Lilies among Thistles, Just like a lily, a beautiful life does not just happen overnight. It is built daily through informed choices, commitment, faith and prayer. The journey towards becoming A Proverbs 31 Lady cannot therefore be taken lightly. It is a difficult, challenging journey filled with both laughter and tears, but a fulfilling one as you will soon find out. If you commit to becoming this woman just one day at a time, it will change not just your relationships but also your whole life.Consider it as a challenge, from one virtuous woman to the other.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Mary Maina: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “To The Lilies among Thistles, Just like a lily, a beautiful life does not just happen overnight. …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que fe, dating, godly-relationships pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de boa-noite e mudanca.

frase_original: To The Lilies among Thistles, Just like a lily, a beautiful life does not just happen overnight. It is built daily through informed choices, commitment, faith and prayer. The journey towards becoming A Proverbs 31 Lady cannot therefore be taken lightly. It is a difficult, challenging journey filled with both laughter and tears, but a fulfilling one as you will soon find out. If you commit to becoming this woman just one day at a time, it will change not just your relationships but also your whole life.Consider it as a challenge, from one virtuous woman to the other.

texto: There is power in a Lady who trusts in God-a lady who has put all her eggs in God’s basket. Women possess some gift that touches the heart of God. This gift is so powerful that Jeremiah, the weeping prophet who was known for his great compassion found himself needing the intercession of women to tap into this power. The Lord asked Him to send for the women to let them take up wailing as God knew His ears are open to the cry of distressed women
explicacao: Citação de Mary Maina sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “There is power in a Lady who trusts in God-a lady who has put all her eggs in God’s basket. Women…” articula amor, god, god-s-love em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como termino e god-s-love.
